report_name: SAP Patches Critical Flaws in Commerce Cloud and S/4HANA with 9.6 CVSS Score

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-34263
vulnerabilities.description: An arbitrary code execution vulnerability in SAP Commerce Cloud caused by an improper configuration of Spring Security. An unauthenticated remote attacker can exploit this by uploading a malicious configuration file, resulting in full control over the Commerce Cloud instance.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-34260
vulnerabilities.description: A SQL injection vulnerability in the SAP Enterprise Search for ABAP component of S/4HANA due to insufficient input validation. An authenticated attacker can inject malicious SQL statements to read, modify, or delete data in the backend database.

identities.name: SAP
identities.description: Vendor of the affected products, SAP Commerce Cloud and SAP S/4HANA, who released the security patches for CVE-2026-34263 and CVE-2026-34260.

identities.name: Cyber Security Agency of Singapore
identities.description: Singapore's Cyber Security Agency (CSA) issued an alert regarding the critical SAP vulnerabilities.

indicators.name: SAP Commerce Cloud Malicious Configuration Upload Attempt
indicators.pattern:
title: SAP Commerce Cloud Malicious Configuration Upload Attempt
id: 2b1a9c8d-3e4f-4a1b-9c8d-2b1a9c8d3e4f
status: experimental
description: Detects unusual file uploads to SAP Commerce Cloud configuration endpoints, which could indicate an attempt to exploit CVE-2026-34263.
references:
  - https://www.csa.gov.sg/alerts-advisories/alerts/2026/al-2026-0513-001
  - https://www.securityweek.com/sap-patches-critical-vulnerabilities-in-commerce-cloud-s-4hana/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-14
tags:
  - attack.t1190
level: high
logsource:
  category: webserver
detection:
  selection:
    cs-method: 'POST'
    c-uri|contains: '/config/upload'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects hunting hint for unusual file uploads to SAP Commerce Cloud configuration endpoints, suggesting a potential exploit attempt of CVE-2026-34263.

indicators.name: Potential SAP Commerce Cloud Post-Exploitation Shell
indicators.pattern:
title: Potential SAP Commerce Cloud Post-Exploitation Shell
id: 8e7f6d5c-4b3a-4e2d-8c1b-9a8f7e6d5c4b
status: experimental
description: Detects a java process, typical for SAP Commerce Cloud, spawning a command shell (sh or cmd.exe). This is a strong indicator of successful remote code execution, potentially via CVE-2026-34263.
references:
  - https://www.csa.gov.sg/alerts-advisories/alerts/2026/al-2026-0513-001
  - https://www.securityweek.com/sap-patches-critical-vulnerabilities-in-commerce-cloud-s-4hana/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-14
tags:
  - attack.t1059
level: critical
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: '\java.exe'
    Image|endswith:
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects hunting hint for a java process spawning a command shell, which would be a strong indicator of successful remote code execution via CVE-2026-34263.

indicators.name: Potential SAP S/4HANA SQL Injection Attempt
indicators.pattern:
title: Potential SAP S/4HANA SQL Injection Attempt
id: 1a2b3c4d-5e6f-4a1b-8c9d-1a2b3c4d5e6f
status: experimental
description: Detects patterns indicative of SQL injection attempts against SAP S/4HANA, as described for CVE-2026-34260. This rule should be monitored in SAP Security Audit Logs or WAF logs.
references:
  - https://www.csa.gov.sg/alerts-advisories/alerts/2026/al-2026-0513-001
  - https://www.securityweek.com/sap-patches-critical-vulnerabilities-in-commerce-cloud-s-4hana/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-14
tags:
  - attack.t1190
level: high
logsource:
  category: webserver
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri-query|contains:
      - "' OR '1'='1"
      - ' OR 1=1'
      - '" OR 1=1'
  filter:
    c-uri-query|contains:
      - '/sap/opu/odata/'
      - '/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/'
  condition: selection and filter
indicators.description: Detects hunting hint for malformed queries indicative of SQL injection attempts related to CVE-2026-34260.
